display.purpose: Hero H1 only. Maximum 5.5rem ceiling. The weight at which the firm's authority is first communicated.

subline.purpose: Hero credential line and section kickers. Weight 500 bridges display and body without competing.

body.purpose: All prose. max-width 52ch on dark surfaces, 65–75ch on light sections.

label.purpose: Single-use uppercase brand positioning kicker. Used once in the hero — not repeated as section grammar.

shadows.name: navbar-scroll
shadows.purpose: Structural separator on the fixed Navbar after 60px scroll. Appears only when the navbar transitions from transparent to opaque. The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrance animations. All Framer Motion stagger reveals use this curve.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Hover state transitions (background-color, border-color, opacity). 150–200ms duration.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.note: Nav links appear; ghost CTA pairs with primary

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.note: Decorative '20' ghost element appears in hero right column

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main conversion CTA. Buenos Aires Brick on dark and light surfaces. Verb + object label always.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo:wght@700&display=swap'); .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background-color: oklch(52% 0.14 25); color: oklch(95% 0.01 75); font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; padding: 0.9rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(58% 0.14 25); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.14 25); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Dark surfaces only, paired alongside Primary. Never used alone or in light sections.
components.html: Llamar ahora
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo:wght@500&display=swap'); .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; color: oklch(95% 0.01 75); font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(95% 0.01 75 / 0.4); border-radius: 0.25rem; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: oklch(95% 0.01 75 / 0.7); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(95% 0.01 75 / 0.5); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Nav CTA
components.description: Persistent WhatsApp action in the fixed Navbar. Smaller than the hero primary; same Buenos Aires Brick.
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo:wght@700&display=swap'); .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background-color: oklch(52% 0.14 25); color: oklch(95% 0.01 75); font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background-color: oklch(58% 0.14 25); } .ds-nav-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.14 25); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Navbar anchor links. Color changes with scroll state (dark: hero-text, light: ink). Opacity-based hover.
components.html: ÁreasSobre FabioContacto
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo:wght@500&display=swap'); .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 200ms ease; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .ds-nav-link--dark { color: oklch(95% 0.01 75); opacity: 0.7; } .ds-nav-link--light { color: oklch(9% 0.01 245); opacity: 0.7; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { opacity: 1; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; text-decoration: underline; }

components.name: Hero CTA Pair
components.description: The canonical hero CTA pattern: Primary + Ghost side by side on the dark hero surface. The only context where the ghost button appears.
components.html: Escribir por WhatsAppLlamar ahora
components.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Archivo:wght@500;700&display=swap'); .ds-hero-ctas { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.75rem; align-items: center; background: oklch(11% 0.012 245); padding: 2rem; } .ds-hero-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background-color: oklch(52% 0.14 25); color: oklch(95% 0.01 75); font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; padding: 0.9rem 1.75rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .ds-hero-btn-primary:hover { background-color: oklch(58% 0.14 25); } .ds-hero-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(58% 0.14 25); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-hero-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; color: oklch(95% 0.01 75); font-family: 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; border: 1px solid oklch(95% 0.01 75 / 0.4); border-radius: 0.25rem; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; white-space: nowrap; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .ds-hero-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: oklch(95% 0.01 75 / 0.7); } .ds-hero-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(95% 0.01 75 / 0.5); outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview:
The office you need when something has gone wrong. A fixed navbar marked 'Dr. Mombello.' A dark hero with a single large statement. One button. The design communicates competence before a word is read — not through decoration, but through discipline. Every removed element is a trust signal. Every restraint is a claim that the work speaks for itself.

This is a decision surface, not a portfolio. The visitor arrives scared: a criminal charge, a termination letter, a custody dispute. They have seconds and a phone. The design must answer three questions in order — 'Is this person competent?', 'Can I trust them?', 'How do I reach them now?' — and answer them without demanding patience. Typography does the work; color marks the action; copy speaks to one person, not a category.

The palette operates in two registers: a near-black hero surface for the first fold, and a near-neutral white body for the sections that follow. The single accent color (Buenos Aires Brick) appears only where a visitor should act.
keyCharacteristics: Single grotesque family (Archivo), weight axis as the sole hierarchy engine
Two color registers (near-black hero, near-white body) with an abrupt, intentional break between them
One accent color (Buenos Aires Brick), one role: action-only
Flat elevation at rest; one structural hairline on the navbar post-scroll
All UI copy in Spanish, always second-person singular, always one person in a bad situation
Typographic scale minimum 1.25× between adjacent roles

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Buenos Aires Brick (--color-accent) appears on CTAs and the navbar button — nowhere else. Its rarity is the conversion signal. Using it decoratively dilutes what it means.

rules.name: The Two-Register Rule
rules.body: The site operates in exactly two color registers: dark (hero) and light (body sections). There is no gradient transition, no blurred boundary, no intermediate surface. The fold break is abrupt and intentional.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: The body background is Document White (oklch(97.5% 0.005 90)), chroma 0.005. Any token in the warm-neutral band (L 0.84–0.97, C < 0.06, hue 40–100) reads as cream/sand/parchment and triggers the AI-generated tell.

rules.name: The No-Serif Rule
rules.body: The system uses Archivo exclusively. Do not introduce a display serif for testimonials, pull quotes, or accent headlines. The voice is the grotesque's voice.

rules.name: The Eyebrow-Once Rule
rules.body: The small uppercase tracked label is a brand positioning statement. It appears once in the hero. If it appears above a second section heading on the same page, it is AI section-grammar, not brand voice.

rules.name: The Weight-Not-Color Rule
rules.body: Emphasis within body copy is through font-weight (400 → 500 → 700), not through color. Colored inline text violates The One Accent Rule.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Interactive elements communicate state through color shift, not shadow lift. No translateY, no box-shadow on hover. The system does not use shadow as decoration or as a hover affordance.

rules.name: The One Hairline Rule
rules.body: The only shadow in the system is the navbar's 1px post-scroll separator. Any second box-shadow must carry functional meaning (focus ring, modal backdrop) — not aesthetic depth.

dos: Do use --color-accent only on CTAs and the navbar button. Scarcity is the trust signal.
Do keep all UI copy in Spanish: navigation, aria-labels, placeholders, error messages, meta tags.
Do write copy to one person in a bad situation — second-person singular, never to a crowd.
Do use clamp() for all fluid type sizes. No breakpoint-only font scaling.
Do use dvh for viewport heights. vh is prohibited.
Do use rem for all font sizes, margins, and padding. px is for borders and outlines only.
Do use CTA labels as verb + object: 'Escribir por WhatsApp', 'Llamar ahora'.
Do keep the ghost button for dark surfaces only, paired with a primary.
Do use text-wrap: balance on H1–H3 and text-wrap: pretty on body paragraphs.
Do verify contrast at every breakpoint: body text minimum 4.5:1 against its background.
donts: Don't use navy-and-gold, marble textures, scales-of-justice imagery, or stock photos of suited handshakes.
Don't use startup or SaaS aesthetics: gradient blobs, glassmorphism, cream/warm-neutral backgrounds, hero metric stat grids.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on any element.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient background).
Don't add a second typeface. Archivo is the system.
Don't use the uppercase tracked eyebrow label above more than one section.
Don't pair border and box-shadow on the same element as decoration.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as structural scaffolding.
Don't use em dashes anywhere in the UI copy.
